content_body: Thank you for a fun, relaxing, and adventurous vacation! We so enjoyed watching the sun peak its golden glow over the lush Smoky Mountains every morning! Tubing up the Toccoa River was a blast! We also enjoyed the scenic train ride into McCaysville. Need I mention the food? The wonderful southern food! Our families are returning home happy and rejuvenated.
title: Happy and Rejuvenated
